name: Auradecantism
description: Luminous glass aesthetic with purple/cyan/pink palette. Bouncy pill shapes, glass morphism effects, and vibrant gradients.
personality: luminous + bouncy + glass + vibrant gradients + pill shapes

decorators.d-mesh: Radial mesh gradient background with pink, cyan, and purple overlays. Apply to page-level containers.
decorators.d-glass: Frosted glass panel — backdrop-blur, semi-transparent bg, subtle border highlight. Apply to cards and panels.
decorators.d-glass-strong: Stronger glass effect with more opacity and thicker blur. For elevated overlays and modals.
decorators.d-gradient-text: Gradient text using primary brand colors (pink → cyan). Apply to headings and hero text.
decorators.d-gradient-text-alt: Alternate gradient text (purple → pink → cyan). For secondary headings and accents.
decorators.aura-glow: Soft glow shadow using primary color. Apply to featured cards or active elements.
decorators.aura-glow-strong: Intense glow for hero KPIs and primary CTAs. 20px spread.
decorators.aura-ring: Animated ring highlight on focus/active state. Pill-shaped glow border.
decorators.aura-orb: Floating decorative gradient orb. Position absolutely as background decoration.
decorators.aura-shimmer: Subtle shimmer animation across surface. Use sparingly for loading or premium feel.
decorators.d-glow-primary: Box-shadow glow using primary color. Apply to stats, featured cards.
decorators.d-glow-accent: Box-shadow glow using accent color. For secondary highlights.
decorators.d-stat-glow: Text-shadow glow for large numbers and metrics.
decorators.d-gradient-hint-primary: Subtle gradient background toward primary color.
decorators.d-gradient-hint-accent: Subtle gradient background toward accent color.
decorators.d-terminal-chrome: macOS-style terminal window with traffic light dots and gradient background.
decorators.d-icon-glow: Glowing icon container with gradient background.

panel.description: Glass panel with subtle border and backdrop blur.

card.description: Card with glass surface and glow on hover.

kpi.description: KPI metric with glass background and gradient value text.

table.description: DataTable with glass wrapper and subtle border.

form.description: Form in a glass card with gradient submit button.
form.example:
const { div, h2 } = tags;
div({ class: css('d-glass _r4 _p6 _flex _col _gap4') },
  h2({ class: css('d-gradient-text _heading4') }, 'Sign In'),
  Input({ label: 'Email', type: 'email' }),
  Input({ label: 'Password', type: 'password' }),
  Button({ variant: 'primary', class: css('_wfull') }, 'Continue')
)

sidebar.description: Glass sidebar with gradient brand and nav items.

layout.description: Full page layout with mesh background, glass sidebar, and content area.

modal.description: Modal with strong glass backdrop and gradient title.

chart.description: Chart in glass panel with gradient title.

d-mesh.description: Radial mesh gradient background with pink, cyan, and purple overlays. Apply to page-level containers.
d-mesh.intent: Use as the foundational page background to establish the luminous, immersive atmosphere. Sets the visual tone for the entire layout.

suggested_properties.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(236,72,153,0.15), transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(14,165,233,0.15), transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 80%, rgba(168,85,247,0.12), transparent 50%), #0F0A1A

d-glass.description: Frosted glass panel — backdrop-blur, semi-transparent bg, subtle border highlight. Apply to cards and panels.
d-glass.intent: Use for elevated content containers that need visual separation from the mesh background while maintaining transparency and depth.

d-glass-strong.description: Stronger glass effect with more opacity and thicker blur. For elevated overlays and modals.
d-glass-strong.intent: Use for overlays and modals that need to stand out prominently above glass panels. Higher opacity ensures readability for critical content.

d-gradient-text.description: Gradient text using primary brand colors (pink → cyan). Apply to headings and hero text.
d-gradient-text.intent: Use for primary headings and hero text that need maximum visual impact. Creates the signature brand gradient effect.

d-gradient-text-alt.description: Alternate gradient text (purple → pink → cyan). For secondary headings and accents.
d-gradient-text-alt.intent: Use for secondary headings or accent text when the primary gradient is already in use. Provides variety while maintaining brand cohesion.

aura-glow.description: Soft glow shadow using primary color. Apply to featured cards or active elements.
aura-glow.intent: Use to draw attention to featured or interactive elements. The glow creates a sense of importance without being overwhelming.

aura-glow-strong.description: Intense glow for hero KPIs and primary CTAs. 20px spread.
aura-glow-strong.intent: Use for the most important interactive elements like primary CTAs and hero KPI displays. Maximum visual prominence.

aura-ring.description: Animated ring highlight on focus/active state. Pill-shaped glow border.
aura-ring.intent: Use for focus and active state indicators on interactive elements. Provides accessible focus indication with the theme's signature glow.

aura-orb.description: Floating decorative gradient orb. Position absolutely as background decoration.
aura-orb.intent: Use as a background decorative element to add depth and visual interest to sections. Position behind content with pointer-events disabled.

aura-shimmer.description: Subtle shimmer animation across surface. Use sparingly for loading or premium feel.
aura-shimmer.intent: Use sparingly for loading states or to add a premium, living quality to surfaces. Avoid overuse to prevent visual fatigue.

d-glow-primary.description: Box-shadow glow using primary color. Apply to stats, featured cards.
d-glow-primary.intent: Use to add a primary-colored glow to containers holding key metrics or featured content. Draws the eye to important data.

d-glow-accent.description: Box-shadow glow using accent color. For secondary highlights.
d-glow-accent.intent: Use for secondary elements that need subtle emphasis alongside primary-glowing elements. Provides color variety in glow effects.

d-stat-glow.description: Text-shadow glow for large numbers and metrics.
d-stat-glow.intent: Use on large numeric displays and KPI values to create a luminous, high-tech readout effect.

d-gradient-hint-primary.description: Subtle gradient background toward primary color.
d-gradient-hint-primary.intent: Use to add a barely perceptible primary color tint to container backgrounds. Creates visual hierarchy without being overt.

d-gradient-hint-accent.description: Subtle gradient background toward accent color.
d-gradient-hint-accent.intent: Use alongside primary hints for visual variety. Apply to secondary content areas to differentiate them from primary sections.

d-terminal-chrome.description: macOS-style terminal window with traffic light dots and gradient background.
d-terminal-chrome.intent: Use for code preview blocks and terminal-style content displays. Creates a familiar developer aesthetic for code snippets.

d-icon-glow.description: Glowing icon container with gradient background.
d-icon-glow.intent: Use to wrap feature icons or status icons that need to stand out with a luminous, branded appearance.
